_comment: Achievement art prompts for local generation. Style targets the EXISTING ach_real_life.jpg look: cinematic, theatrical, dark-with-gold, square. Each subject is themed to the achievement's song-pun name (not its unlock condition). Keep `style` + `negative` IDENTICAL across all items for a consistent set; only `subject` changes. Output → public/achievements/<id>.png (the app loads .png then .jpg).
style: 2D illustrated emblem, painterly art-deco poster, bold ICONIC composition with the subject large and centered filling the frame, warm gold and amber on a deep midnight-blue background, clean confident shapes with a soft luminous glow, elegant and reverent, orchestral music theme, flat hand-illustrated look (no photographic depth), matches a gold-on-black music game's 2D art, 1:1 square
negative: text, words, letters, typography, captions, label, gibberish text, fake writing, signature, watermark, logo, photorealistic, 3d render, photograph, realistic skin, cinematic photo, depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, busy cluttered background, ornate border, picture frame, wide empty stage, tiny distant subject, low quality, blurry, deformed, extra limbs
_subject_note: EVOCATIVE, not literal — the IDEA the song-pun evokes, as a single bold ICONIC object/silhouette centered on a near-empty background. NOT a busy scene. Reference-guided img2img should ground each on a clean reference of this subject.

items.name: Is This the Real Life?
items.subject: four faceless heads in a row emerging from deep shadow (the iconic Bohemian Rhapsody silhouette), centered

items.name: Let It Be
items.subject: a single grand piano, lid raised, calm and serene, one soft beam of light, centered on a near-empty background

items.name: Magnum Opus
items.subject: a laurel wreath crowning a single conductor's baton, a crowning masterwork emblem, centered

items.name: Purple Rain
items.subject: a single electric guitar standing upright with rain falling around it, centered silhouette

items.name: One More Time
items.subject: a single glowing vinyl record spinning, an encore call, centered

items.name: Seven Nation Army
items.subject: a single bold marching bass drum, relentless rhythm, centered emblem
